subcodes.first_line: The Day of the Promise is come, and He Who is the Promised One loudly proclaimeth... I swear by God! That which had been enshrined from eternity... Happy is the eye that seeth, and the face that turneth towards
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
